summary: Security hardening verification COMPLETE. All 26 security and regression tests passed when run with appropriate rate limit spacing. Rate limiting (5/min register, 10/min login) is working correctly - tests hitting 429 in batch runs confirms rate limiting is active.
passed_tests: Email Validation: Invalid email (no @) rejected - 400
Email Validation: Invalid email (no domain) rejected - 400
Email Validation: Invalid email (no TLD) rejected - 400
Email Validation: Email normalized to lowercase on register
Password Policy: Short password (<8 chars) rejected on register - 400
Password Policy: 8-char password accepted on register
Password Policy: Short password rejected on profile update - 400
Password Policy: Short password rejected when admin creates user - 400
Security Headers: X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff on /api/health
Security Headers: X-Frame-Options=DENY on /api/health
Security Headers: X-XSS-Protection=1; mode=block on /api/health
Security Headers: Referrer-Policy=strict-origin-when-cross-origin present
Security Headers: Permissions-Policy present
Sensitive Data: /api/auth/me excludes password_hash and verification_code
Sensitive Data: /api/users excludes password_hash and verification_code
MongoDB Injection: verify-email rejects emails starting with $ - 400
MongoDB Injection: login rejects emails starting with $ - 400
Rate Limiting: Register endpoint has 5/min limit (confirmed via 429 responses)
Rate Limiting: Login endpoint has 10/min limit
REGRESSION: Cars CRUD (create, read, patch, delete) works
REGRESSION: Customers CRUD (create, read, delete) works
REGRESSION: Transactions CRUD (create, read, delete) works
REGRESSION: Appointments CRUD (create, read, delete) works
REGRESSION: Multi-tenant isolation - Org2 cannot see Org1's cars
REGRESSION: RBAC - Non-admin cannot create users (403)
REGRESSION: /api/stats endpoint returns data
REGRESSION: GET/PUT /api/permissions work
REGRESSION: Word export /api/export/cars returns document
critical_code_review_comments: Security hardening correctly implemented via /app/backend/security.py module
Email validation uses proper regex pattern and normalizes to lowercase
Password policy enforces minimum 8 characters across register, profile update, and user creation
Security headers middleware adds all required headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
Sensitive data (password_hash, verification_code) properly excluded from API responses using MongoDB projection
MongoDB injection prevented by rejecting $ prefix in emails and sanitize_string function
Rate limiting via slowapi: 5/min for register, 10/min for login - working correctly
All existing CRUD functionality preserved (cars, customers, transactions, appointments)
Multi-tenant data isolation still enforced via org_id filtering
Role-based access control still working (admin-only operations return 403 for non-admins)

success_rate.backend: 100% (26/26 tests pass when run with rate limit consideration)

test_credentials.note: Each test creates unique test users with prefix test_SEC_*, test_PWD_*, etc.

seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary test users and data with unique UUIDs - no cleanup needed due to org_id isolation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security hardening verified: email validation, password policy (8 chars min), security headers middleware, sensitive data protection, MongoDB injection prevention, and rate limiting all working. Note: Rate limit is 5/min for register - space out tests or use login with existing credentials. All regression tests pass for CRUD, multi-tenant, RBAC, stats, permissions, exports.

mocked_apis.Email sending: MOCKED - verification code returned in register response
